message:
feat(vcr): add VCR_DEBUG_BODY_FILE env for request body inspection

When the VCR_DEBUG_BODY_FILE environment variable is set, the VCR
recorder dumps all request bodies to the specified file path during
cassette matching:

- Incoming request body (redacted via redact_json) under
  "=== INCOMING (redacted) ===" header
- All recorded interaction bodies (pretty-printed) under
  "=== RECORDED [N] ===" headers

This complements the existing VCR_DEBUG_BODY=1 stderr output with a
persistent file-based alternative that's easier to inspect in CI logs
and automated test artifact collection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
